title: Soulful Japa: Session 23: Rain of Mercy-Isolated Chant&hear vs Concurrent Hear & chant-Module 38-53

segments.text: Jai Shila Prabhupada. Hare Krishna Nama Prabhukti Jai. Welcome all of you. I hope you are all enjoying the new way of chanting or the right way of chanting and hearing.

Instead of separating them, you have to chant, come here. You have to chant and know that very chant. So this way you will find a very pleasant energy in your heart and mind, which will want you to do bead after bead, bead after bead.
And this pleasant taste is nothing but the taste of devotion service. It is given by the Nama Prabhupada to the chanter. And that has the power to change old habits, even overnight.
Now you understand why somebody asked a question, how can it change overnight? It can change overnight because
you're being free from the offense of inattentive chanting. And the Lord is very pleased. Immediately you get the taste of devotion service.
It's something that they actually in the depth of the heart, the living entity wants to relish that taste of serving the Lord.
